---
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
brand:
  typography:
    fonts:
      - family: Barrio
        source: google
      - family: Roboto
        source: google
      - family: Inconsolata
        source: google
    base: InvalidFont, Roboto, 
    headings: Barrio, Times New Roman
    monospace: InvalidFont, Inconsolata
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      ensureTypstFileRegexMatches:
        -
          # InvalidFont filtered out by font availability check (#12556)
          - 'font: \("Roboto",\),'
          - 'codefont: \("Inconsolata",\),'
          # heading fonts both available, so tuple preserved intact
          - '#show heading: set text\(font: \("Barrio", "Times New Roman"\), \)'
        - []
      ensurePdfRegexMatches:
        -
          - 'Heading is \("barrio", "times new roman"\)'
        - []
---

```{=typst}
#set text(fallback: false)
```

## Base font

Base is `#context text.font`{=typst}

{{< lipsum 1 >}}

## Heading is `#context text.font`{=typst}


::: {style="font-family: Barrio"}
{{< lipsum 1 >}}
:::

```js
const fib = num => num < 2 ? num : fib(num-1) + fib(num - 2);
console.log(fib(12))
```
